name: akshare-stock
tagline: ClawHub (98★): A股量化数据分析工具，基于AkShare库获取A股行情、财务数据、板块信息等。用于回答关于A股股票查询、行情数据、财务分析、选股等问题。
verdict: Main gap: it never specifies what the final output should look like — table, narrative, sections — leaving presentation entirely to guesswork, which invites inconsistent results across runs. It also has no scope-limiting language for its broad multi-category financial domain, and skips version tracking entirely.

highlights.summary: Nowhere does the skill state what the final deliverable to the user should look like (format, sections, table vs. narrative); it only lists API calls to run, leaving presentation o
No 'NOT for' / exclusion / pointer-to-other-skill text appears anywhere in description or body, despite covering a broad multi-category domain (quotes, financials, sectors, fund fl
No version field in frontmatter, no changelog section, and no dated revision notes appear anywhere in the file.
